name: Jewelled Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube or fluted tube pan.
3. Combine flour and baking soda in a bowl.
4. In a large bowl, beat eggs and stir in the remaining ingredients: sweatened condensed milk, green candied cherries, red candied cherries, apricots, dried pineapple, and pecans.
5. Blend in the dry ingredients until well combined.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
9. Allow to cool further before serving.
